entities.name: Ryan Carson
entities.context: Founder who posted about 'super-unicorn' employee traits on X, advocating for multi-skilled hires in the LLM era

entities.name: Jocko Willink
entities.context: Referenced by Carson as source of 'extreme ownership' concept

entities.name: Super-unicorn
entities.context: Carson's term for rare employees combining developer skills, design taste, product focus, marketing, agent expertise, high EQ, 5+ years experience, and extreme ownership

entities.name: Extreme ownership
entities.context: Leadership/accountability principle attributed to Jocko Willink, listed as super-unicorn trait

entities.name: Resume-optimized hiring
entities.context: Critique that modern hiring infrastructure (ATS, structured interviews, take-homes) optimizes for resumes rather than finding super-unicorns

entities.name: Applicant Tracking Systems
entities.context: Part of hiring infrastructure criticized for optimizing around resumes

entities.name: LinkedIn Recruiter
entities.context: Expensive hiring tool mentioned as part of resume-centric infrastructure

relationships.context: Carson argues super-unicorns are the only type worth hiring in the LLM era
Carson credits Willink for the extreme ownership concept
Extreme ownership is one of the defining traits of super-unicorns
Modern hiring infrastructure fails to identify super-unicorn candidates
